explanations.13: The `layout` parameter defaults to 'big' if not provided, meaning this component has two different display modes.
explanations.14: If no image is provided in the post data, this fallback image path will be used instead.
explanations.16: This pulls out individual properties from the post object using destructuring, so we can use them directly as variables instead of writing `post.title` everywhere.
explanations.17: This hook gives us information about the current website context, including which language the user is viewing the site in.
explanations.26: The `||` operator here means 'use the post's image if it exists, otherwise use the default image as a backup'.
explanations.36: The `&&` operator means 'only render this counter element if the counter value actually exists and is truthy'.
explanations.63: The `aria-label` attribute provides an accessibility description for screen readers, telling them what the link does.
explanations.66: The ` ` is a special character that creates a non-breaking space before the arrow, keeping them together visually.
explanations.87: This tells PropTypes to only accept 'big' or 'small' as valid values for the layout prop.
